title: Joomla to PHP/JSON Conversion
summary: Full migration of a Joomla site to the PHP/JSON flat-file stack. Export, content restructure, URL mapping, and live deploy.
description: A complete walkthrough of converting a legacy Joomla installation to the flat-file PHP/JSON architecture. We export content, map it to JSON records, set up the routing system, handle URL redirects, and deploy to the same VPS without downtime.
